**Which generator?**
e.g. https://randtools.com/random-name-generator

**What happened?**
A clear description of the issue.

**What did you expect?**
A description of the expected behavior.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Browser & OS**
e.g. Chrome 120 on macOS 14
